title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates a low-code approach to building AI applications by integrating Gemini with corporate databases like Cloud SQL and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. The platform enables rapid development of intelligent features including natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations without requiring specialized AI expertise.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through a low-code workflow for building AI applications, connecting Gemini to corporate databases including Cloud SQL and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. The approach targets small teams that lack specialized AI expertise, using spec-driven development and auto-generated code to add intelligent features quickly. Concrete capabilities covered include natural language interfaces, vector and hybrid search, image search, and recommendations.
